creator: omar.polo@protonmail.com
text:
Hi,

It seems that the owner of the github repo has archived it. That github repo was slightly outdated anyway: the last release of stack should be 1.6.3.

I think it should be better trying to port stack directly from upstream and ignore the github repo, so I'll try.

Should we close this bug and open a new one when I'll manage to get 1.6.3 working or keep this bug to track the progress?
